title: synaedrys luzoniensis
side_effects: Synaedrys luzoniensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to kidney damage and liver failure. Additionally, the plant's toxic compounds can cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, Synaedrys luzoniensis can also cause skin irritation, rashes, and blisters.
